content:
RORK — LANDING PAGE END-TO-END AUDIT + FIX MAIN SCREEN JUMPING NOW

This is my second request. Do not return only an audit. Fix the landing page jumping issue and deploy.

LIVE URL:
https://ivxholding.com/

PROBLEMS TO FIX:
1. Main screen jumps when images/deals load.
2. Slider/deals area changes height after render.
3. Signup modal and sections may shift page layout.
4. Mobile Android/iOS landing must stay stable.
5. Remove layout shift on hero/main screen.
6. No fake/demo members or fake deal counts.

EXECUTE NOW:
1. Audit landing page end-to-end.
2. Find every component causing layout shift/jumping.
3. Add fixed/min-height containers for hero, deal slider, image cards, signup area, and mobile preview.
4. Reserve image/video dimensions before load.
5. Add skeleton loading without changing height.
6. Prevent auto-scroll or focus jump when modal/signup opens.
7. Verify desktop, Android, and iOS viewports.
8. Verify landing page loads without jumping.
9. Verify signup form still works.
10. Verify live deals still show.
11. Push to GitHub main.
12. Deploy to Render/production.
13. Return real live proof only.

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

STATE:
ROOT_CAUSE:
FILES_CHANGED:
LAYOUT_SHIFT_FIX:
HERO_STATUS:
DEALS_SLIDER_STATUS:
SIGNUP_MODAL_STATUS:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
DESKTOP_STATUS:
SIGNUP_STATUS:
LIVE_DEALS_STATUS:
TESTS_RUN:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_URL:
SCREENSHOTS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULES:
Do not mark VERIFIED unless the live production landing page is tested and no jumping/layout shift remains.
No narrative.
No fake proof.
No “verified + blocked.”
